task_completion.description: Open the commercial lease template document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graphical word processor (e.g., Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer) open with the file 'commercial_lease.odt' loaded.

task_completion.description: Replace name and address placeholders with correct values
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Meridian Properties LLC', 'Coastal Brewing Company', and their respective addresses in the document. The original bracketed placeholders (e.g., [LANDLORD_NAME], [PROPERTY_ADDRESS]) should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Replace date, term, and financial placeholders with correct values
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for specific lease terms like '$8,750.00', '$17,500.00', 'January 15, 2026', and 'Five (5) years' inserted into the document text, replacing the original bracketed placeholders.
Look at the document title at the top. It should be centered and bolded. When the title is selected or the cursor is on it, the font size dropdown in the toolbar should show 14pt.

task_completion.description: Apply Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles to articles and sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Article headings and Section subheadings. They should visually appear as distinct hierarchical heading styles. The style dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Heading 1' when an Article is selected, and 'Heading 2' when a Section subheading is selected.

task_completion.description: Format the body text to 12pt justified
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main paragraph text. The text alignment should be justified (flush with both left and right margins, often indicated by the justified alignment button being active in the toolbar) and the font size dropdown should show 12pt.

task_completion.description: Save the completed document to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the file being saved, such as the user clicking the 'Save' icon, using a 'Save As' dialog confirming the path '/home/ga/Documents/commercial_lease.odt', or the application window title showing the file is saved (e.g., no asterisk indicating unsaved changes).

integrity.description: The agent must use a graphical word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent is interacting with a GUI application like Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer, rather than using terminal commands or text editors to modify the raw XML of the .odt file.

integrity.description: The agent must not use scripts to bypass manual editing
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent did not write or execute Python scripts, bash scripts, or use tools like `sed` to automatically replace text or format the document.

integrity.description: The agent must edit the existing document, not overwrite it with a newly generated text
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the presence of original legal boilerplate terms in the document, such as 'quiet enjoyment', 'indemnification', 'force majeure', or 'governing law', proving the original template was preserved and modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/commercial_lease.odt. Expected replacements: [LANDLORD_NAME] -> Meridian Properties LLC, [TENANT_NAME] -> Coastal Brewing Company, [PROPERTY_ADDRESS] -> 1847 Harbor Boulevard, Suite 200, Oceanside, CA 92054, [EFFECTIVE_DATE] -> January 15, 2026, [LEASE_TERM] -> Five (5) years, [MONTHLY_RENT] -> $8,750.00, [SECURITY_DEPOSIT] -> $17,500.00, [PERMITTED_USE] -> Craft brewery taproom and retail sales, [LANDLORD_ADDRESS] -> 500 Pacific Coast Highway, Suite 100, Carlsbad, CA 92008, [TENANT_ADDRESS] -> 2200 Mission Avenue, Oceanside, CA 92054, [COMMENCEMENT_DATE] -> March 1, 2026, [EXPIRATION_DATE] -> February 28, 2031. Formatting: Title must be bold, centered, 14pt. Article headings must be Heading 1. Section subheadings must be Heading 2. Body text must be 12pt justified. The original document text must be preserved, specifically containing the phrases: 'quiet enjoyment', 'indemnification', 'force majeure', 'governing law'.
